title: Subscription & Billing

gateway.autoHint: You will be redirected to the payment gateway. Your plan renews automatically after a successful payment.

pickShopWarning: You have multiple shops — select a shop from the menu (top) to view and pay for the correct subscription.
dataMismatch: Subscription data does not match the selected shop. Reload the page or switch shops.

transfer.qrHint: Scan QR to pay (amount/memo prefilled when supported)
transfer.instructionsStatic:
Total due: {{amount}} ({{months}} months × {{monthly}}/month).
After you click "Pay", the system will provide a transaction ID — please use the exact transfer memo.
An admin will confirm during business hours; your plan is extended for the full {{months}} months once confirmed.
transfer.instructionsPayment:
1) Transfer exactly {{amount}} to the account above.
2) Transfer memo: {{content}} (must match exactly).
3) After transferring, wait for admin confirmation — you will be notified when payment is recorded.

reportTransfer.hint: After you have transferred the correct amount and memo, click the button on the right to notify admin for reconciliation — this does not replace admin confirmation.
reportTransfer.reportedAt: Admin notified at {{date}}. Please wait for confirmation (usually during business hours).

currentStatus.title: Current status
currentStatus.description: Each shop gets a free 30-day trial. After the trial, 99,000 VND/month — pay ahead for 3, 6, 9 or 12 months in one bank transfer. Your plan is extended after admin confirms.
currentStatus.lockedWarning: Write operations (create/edit/delete orders, products, customers…) are locked. Pay to restore access.

billingPeriod.title: Choose billing period
billingPeriod.subtitle: Pay once for multiple months — no need to transfer every month.
billingPeriod.savingsHint: Renew for {{months}} months in one payment; admin confirms once.

history.title: Plan & payment history
history.description: Status changes, payment transactions, and admin actions (if any). When admin confirms, the PAYMENT row records time and transaction ID.

toast.paymentSuccess: {{gateway}} payment successful. Your plan will update within a few minutes.
toast.paymentFail: {{gateway}} payment failed (code {{code}}). Please try again or choose another method.
toast.cancelConfirm: Cancel the pending transfer request? You can create a new payment code afterwards.
toast.cancelFail: Could not cancel. Try again or contact support.
toast.reportSuccess: Recorded: you reported the transfer. Admin will reconcile and confirm soon.
toast.reportFailGeneric: Could not record. Try again or contact support.
toast.txnCreated: Transaction {{id}} created. Admin has been notified — after you transfer, please wait for confirmation (usually during business hours).
toast.requestRecorded: Request recorded. Please transfer using the account details — admin is notified when configured.
toast.payInitFail: Could not start payment. Please try again later.

banner.expired: Your subscription has expired. Write operations are locked until you pay 99,000 VND to renew.
banner.trialEnding: You have {{days}} days left on trial. After that, pay 99,000 VND/month to continue.
banner.renewSoon: Your plan expires in {{days}} days. Renew early to avoid interruption.
